questions.question: Which document discusses OCR for text inside natural scene images using a hierarchical centroid shape descriptor and reports 97.87% accuracy with SVM?
Which document presents a method for extracting virtual baselines from scene text using curvilinear projection and emphasizes robustness to blur, noise, and non-text objects?
Which document explains the distinction between retroactive and nonretroactive requirements for weighing and measuring devices?
Which document includes instructions about battery handling, USB base connection, and proper disposal precautions for a handheld scanner?
In which document would you find discussion of Support Vector Machine and K-Nearest Neighbor as classifiers used after OCR feature extraction?
In which document would you find discussion of curved text detection and the relationship between text boundaries and text center lines?
Which document would you consult for requirements covering commercial weighing and measuring equipment used in regulation or trade?
Which document should be used to check safety instructions before charging, using, or discarding the scanner battery?
